prompt: A gritty cyberpunk anime illustration of Miyamoto Iori, a 19-year-old FPV drone racer, standing in three-quarter back view inside a vast ruined industrial racing arena at night. She has black hair tied in a messy high ponytail, pale skin, and wears a glossy black tactical flight suit covered in patches, straps, cables, and sponsor markings. A massive hard-shell backpack radio rig with long antennas and decals is mounted on her back, and an ID badge hangs from her waist. Her face is mostly hidden in profile and partially obscured, creating a mysterious mood. The environment is dense with steel beams, catwalks, hanging wires, broken windows, concrete pillars, wet reflective floors, and layered signage. Multiple FPV racing drones are actively flying through the arena, leaving bright curved light trails in white, cyan, and red that loop through the scene and guide the eye into depth. Include exactly 6 visible drones in the distance and midground. Add large weathered signs reading "SECTION C", "FREEDOM, SPEED, ONLY", and "LAP 07 KEEP FLYING", plus a vertical character info block in the upper left with the text "MIYAMOTO IORI", "AGE: 19", "FPV DRONE RACER", the Japanese quote "私は、飛ぶ者だ。" and the English line "I am the one who flies." Also include a short stat list reading "RANKING // 2", "WINS // 11", "PODIUMS // 23", and "STYLE // GHOST". On her suit and gear, show readable decals including "AXIS", "Fly Beyond", "BRX", "IORI 027", and an ID card labeled "PILOT MIYAMOTO IORI". Use a dark monochrome palette with steel gray, black, and muted brown, punctuated by neon racing trails and small white light sources. Cinematic backlighting, rain-soaked reflections, heavy texture, intricate linework, urban decay, high contrast, moody atmosphere, highly detailed anime-concept-art aesthetic, vertical poster composition.
